refuses.title: If your cat refuses it
refuses.description: Some cats never adapt to wearing anything on their collar. That's real. If Whiskcam isn't for yours, return it within 30 days — we refund you fully and you keep the setup guide.

lost.title: If you lose or break it
lost.description: We built Whiskcam to be replaceable, not precious. Lose it outdoors or drop it? Email us — we offer a discounted replacement for existing customers.

help.title: If you don't know how to start
help.description: A digital setup guide ships with every order. For anything the guide doesn't cover, email us — a real person reads and replies within 24 hours.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Got questions? We've got answers.
faq.pageSubtitle: Everything you need to know about Whiskcam.

0.question: What if I'm not satisfied?
0.answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee, no questions asked. If you or your pet aren't happy with Whiskcam, simply email us at support@whiskcam.com and we'll process a full refund — you don't even need to return the product. We stand behind every Whiskcam because we know you'll love it.

1.question: Is Whiskcam safe for my cat or small dog?
1.answer: Whiskcam is safe for adult cats and small dogs under 10 kg (Chihuahua, Yorkshire, Pomeranian, Dachshund, Cavalier King Charles, and similar breeds). At just 24g — lighter than a small bell — it clips securely onto any existing collar with smooth, rounded edges. Even small cats barely notice it. We recommend a breakaway collar for outdoor pets.

2.question: How long does the battery last?
2.answer: Whiskcam records up to 2 hours of Full HD video on a full charge — perfect for capturing morning patrols and evening adventures. A full charge takes under an hour via USB-C.

3.question: Do I need to download an app?
3.answer: No app, no WiFi, no accounts. Just press the record button on the camera. When your pet comes home, pop out the SD card, plug it into your phone using the included adapter, and enjoy the footage. It's that simple.

4.question: How do I watch the videos on my phone?
4.answer: Every Whiskcam comes with a MicroSD-to-USB-C/Lightning adapter. Plug it into your phone and view the videos directly in your gallery app. You can also plug the SD card into any computer with a card reader.

5.question: Will it fit my pet's collar?
5.answer: Whiskcam comes with an adjustable 39 cm breakaway collar and also clips onto any existing collar. It fits all cats and small dogs under 10 kg (Chihuahua, Yorkshire, Pomeranian, Dachshund, Cavalier King Charles, and similar breeds). For larger dogs we recommend a dedicated pet action camera mount.

6.question: How long does shipping take?
6.answer: We ship worldwide for free. Delivery typically takes 7–14 business days depending on your location. You'll receive a tracking number as soon as your Whiskcam ships.

7.question: What video format does it record in?
7.answer: Whiskcam records in AVI format at 1080P Full HD. The files play on any device — phone, tablet, or computer. You can easily convert or share them on TikTok, Instagram, or YouTube.

about.title: Born from Curiosity
about.opening: It started with a simple question: What does my cat actually do all day?
about.p1: We'd come home to knocked-over plants, mysterious scratches on the furniture, and a cat that looked suspiciously innocent. We had to know.
about.p2: So we strapped a tiny camera to our cat's collar and pressed record. What we saw blew our minds — garden patrols, rooftop adventures, secret meetings with the neighbor's cat. A whole world we never knew existed.
about.p3: That's when Whiskcam was born. We wanted every pet parent to experience that same joy — to see the world through their pet's eyes.
about.p4: We designed it to be dead simple. No app. No WiFi. No complicated setup. Just clip it on, press record, and let your pet do the rest.
about.closing: See their world. You won't believe what you've been missing.
